title: Dolicholus cinereus
taxonomy: Dolicholus cinereus is classified as a species within the genus Dolicholus, which is part of the family Fabaceae. The genus Dolicholus is a group of flowering plants commonly known as bush clover or round-leaved clover. The family Fabaceae is a large and diverse group of plants that includes legumes, commonly known as beans, peas, and clover. Dolicholus cinereus is a type of perennial herb, and its classification reflects its shared characteristics with other members of the Fabaceae family. Further classification of Dolicholus cinereus would include its order, family, and kingdom, placing it within the plant kingdom, kingdom Plantae, order Fabales, family Fabaceae, genus Dolicholus, and species Dolicholus cinereus.
